definitions.text: skog, beite eller fjellvidder som stat, kommune eller private eier, men der de enkelte gårdene har bruksrett
definitions.translation: forest, pasture, mountain plateau owned by the state, municipality, or private owner, but where individual farms have usage rights
examples: beite i allmenningen må være avtalt

definitions.text: bred gate, plass i en by (til vern mot at brann sprer seg)
definitions.translation: wide street, square in a city (to prevent fire from spreading)
